title: Manpages: Missing examples for `--filter` flag
body:
The following Manpages are missing examples of the command using the `--filter` flag:
* `podman system prune`
* `podman stop`
* `podman start`
* `podman rm`
* `podman restart`
* `podman ps`
* `podman pod ps`

comments.body:
Hi team,
I’d like to work on this task. Please assign this issue to me if there are no objections. Thanks!
You can assign it to yourself with `/assign`

Hi @mheon 
I have created the PR for this issue. Kindly review this. Thanks!

Hi @mheon  / @Honny1 / Maintainers,
Just checking in on this ticket for which I have raised the PR #26740  it adds --filter flag usage examples to various commands as discussed in issue 
All CI checks are passing and I’ve addressed previous feedback. Please let me know if there’s anything else I can adjust or clarify before it’s ready for merge.
Thanks for your time and review!
